_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: llama.cpp
author: your@email.com
description: Runs llama.cpp llama-server. Uses a Wings-compatible wrapper image built from ghcr.io/ggml-org/llama.cpp with the ENTRYPOINT stripped. CUDA variant requires the nvidia container runtime set as default on the Wings node.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y wget
cd /mnt/server
mkdir -p models
if [ -n "${MODEL_URL}" ] && [ "${MODEL_URL}" != "none" ]; then
  echo "Downloading model: ${MODEL_URL}"
  wget -q --show-progress -O "models/${MODEL_FILE}" "${MODEL_URL}"
  echo "Saved: models/${MODEL_FILE}"
else
  echo "No MODEL_URL set. Upload your GGUF to /home/container/models/${MODEL_FILE} via SFTP."
fi
echo "Done!"

variables.name: Model File Name
variables.description: Filename of the GGUF model inside the models/ folder. Example: mistral-7b.Q4_K_M.gguf

variables.name: Model Download URL
variables.description: Direct download URL for the GGUF model (e.g. HuggingFace raw link). Set to 'none' to skip and upload manually via SFTP.

variables.name: GPU Layers (n-gpu-layers)
variables.description: Layers to offload to GPU. Set 999 to offload everything. Set 0 for CPU-only.

variables.name: Context Size
variables.description: Context window in tokens. Higher = more VRAM. Common values: 2048, 4096, 8192.

variables.name: CPU Threads
variables.description: CPU threads for non-GPU layers. Match to your allocated vCPU count.

variables.name: Extra Flags
variables.description: Additional llama-server flags. Example: --flash-attn --mlock. Leave blank for defaults.
